# checkpointsase_object_addresses (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "checkpointsase_object_addresses" "internal_api" {
  name        = "internalApi"
  description = "Internal API host"
  value_type  = "ip"
  value       = ["10.0.0.1"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `value` (List of String)
- `value_type` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `ip_version` (String)
- `last_updated` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import an existing object_addresses resource by its ID.
terraform import checkpointsase_object_addresses.example <id>
```
